name: Lidle Legend
author: Poki
description: Get ready for a journey of legendary proportions in Lidle Legend! In this action adventure game, you play as a small adventurer who has to train to become the hero the land needs and save the kingdom! To get stronger, you can fight weaker monsters out in the forests. Every win makes you stronger and when you're strong enough, you can face one of the bosses. Kill a boss and you will receive coins that you can spend to permanently make your character hit harder! You can also use your coins to style your character with different weapons and pets. Are you ready to take on this epic quest and save the day? How to play Lidle Legend? Use the WASD, the mouse or tap to move around! Use the Spacebar to attack the bosses! Who created Lidle Legend? Lidle Legend was created by AJ Ordaz. Play their other games on Poki: La Petite Avril , A Pretty Odd Bunny and A Pretty Odd Bunny: Roast it! How can I play Lidle Legend for free? You can play Lidle Legend for free on Poki. Can I play Lidle Legend on mobile devices and desktop? Lidle Legend can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
